description: A date or date range picker with a calendar panel. Use when the user needs to select a specific date or date range.
instructions: DatePicker does not include its own trigger or popover — combine DatePicker.Input as the Flyout.Trigger and DatePicker (or DatePicker.Range) inside Flyout.Content for the standard pattern. Dates are represented as plain objects { year, month, day } — not JS Date objects. Use DatePicker.Range for range selection. Pass disabledDates to restrict selectable dates.
name: DatePicker
